name: Justice Uday Umesh Lalit
bio: Justice Uday Umesh Lalit served as the 49th Chief Justice of India for a brief tenure from August to November 2022. He was the second judge to be directly elevated from the Bar to the Supreme Court. Known for his expertise in criminal law and his efficient court management, he initiated several reforms during his short tenure as CJI including constituting five-judge Constitution Benches on important pending matters. He retired after 74 days as Chief Justice.
